default.title: MESSOB Fleet Management Help
default.description: Welcome to the MESSOB Fleet Management System. Select a section from the guides to learn more.
quickTips: Use the navigation menu to access different features
Your role determines which features you can access
Check your profile in the top right corner

requests/new.title: Create New Trip Request
requests/new.description: Submit a vehicle request for your official travel needs
quickTips: Complete all 4 steps of the wizard
Provide detailed trip justification (minimum 10 characters)
Select appropriate vehicle category for your needs
Requests are reviewed by dispatchers within 24 hours
steps: Enter trip purpose and select vehicle category
Choose start and end date/time for your trip
Review all details and submit your request

faq.question: How long does approval take?
faq.answer: Most requests are reviewed within 24 hours. Urgent requests are prioritized.

faq.question: Can I edit my request after submission?
faq.answer: You can cancel pending requests and create new ones. Contact your dispatcher for changes to approved requests.

faq.question: What vehicle category should I choose?
faq.answer: Choose based on passenger count and trip type: Sedan (1-4 people), SUV (rough terrain), Bus (8+ people).

requests/status.title: My Trip Requests
requests/status.description: View and manage all your trip requests
quickTips: Filter requests by status (Pending, Approved, In Progress, etc.)
Click on any request to view full details
Track your approved trips in real-time
You can cancel pending requests if plans change

faq.question: What do the status colors mean?
faq.answer: Yellow = Pending review, Green = Approved, Blue = In Progress, Gray = Completed

faq.question: How do I track my vehicle?
faq.answer: Click on an approved or in-progress trip to see live GPS tracking

dispatch/approvals.title: Approve Trip Requests
dispatch/approvals.description: Review and process pending vehicle requests
quickTips: Requests are sorted by priority score automatically
Check vehicle and driver availability before assignment
Provide clear rejection reasons when declining requests
Use the calendar view to visualize fleet schedule
steps: Review request details and priority level
Check requester information and trip purpose
Assign available vehicle matching the category
Assign available driver for the time slot
Approve to notify the requester and driver

faq.question: How is priority calculated?
faq.answer: Priority is based on urgency, wait time, trip start time, and requester history. You can manually override if needed.

faq.question: What if no vehicles are available?
faq.answer: You can reject with reason or check alternative time slots in the fleet calendar.

dispatch/fleet-calendar.title: Fleet Calendar
dispatch/fleet-calendar.description: Visual overview of vehicle schedules and assignments
quickTips: Drag and drop to reschedule trips
Click on any trip to view or edit details
Color coding shows vehicle status and availability
Use filters to show specific vehicles or drivers

tracking.title: Live GPS Tracking
quickTips: Blue marker shows your vehicle's current location
Route line shows planned path
Speed and heading are updated every second
Click 'View Progress' to center map on vehicle

faq.question: Why isn't my vehicle moving on the map?
faq.answer: The vehicle may be stopped. Check if ignition status shows 'On'. GPS updates may have a slight delay.

faq.question: Can I see other passengers' locations?
faq.answer: Yes, if multiple staff share the same vehicle, you'll see all pickup points for coordination.

driver/requests.title: My Assigned Trips
driver/requests.description: View and manage your assigned trips
quickTips: Start trip when you begin the journey
Update fuel and odometer readings
Complete trip when you reach destination
Report any incidents immediately
steps: Review trip details and passenger information
Update status and click 'Complete Trip' when finished

faq.question: What if I'm running late?
faq.answer: Contact the passenger and dispatcher immediately. You can add notes to the trip.

faq.question: How do I log fuel?
faq.answer: Use the 'Fuel Log' section to enter refueling details including volume, cost, and odometer.

mechanic.title: Maintenance Dashboard
quickTips: Check maintenance alerts daily
Log all repairs with complete details
Update vehicle status after service
Schedule next maintenance based on odometer or date

admin.title: System Administration
admin.description: Manage users, vehicles, and system settings
quickTips: Assign roles carefully - they control access levels
Review audit logs regularly for security
Keep vehicle and driver records up to date
Monitor system performance metrics

manuals.title: Staff User Manual
manuals.description: Complete guide for staff members requesting vehicles

manuals.title: Dispatcher Operations Manual
manuals.description: Fleet management and trip approval procedures

manuals.title: Driver Handbook
manuals.description: Driver responsibilities and mobile app usage

manuals.title: Administrator's Guide
manuals.description: System configuration, user management, and troubleshooting
